programme.title: E8 - 蔡健雅曝心酸往事
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: E18 - 愛錯的人教會我們做對的事
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E6 - 今晚我是你們的婚禮嘉賓
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E18 - 愛錯的人教會我們做對的事
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E108 - The Team Truck Challenge
programme.desc: It's the day of the Team Truck Challenge, a race where all the trucks get to compete in teams of two! But when Crusher chooses a new partner instead of Pickle, his disappointed sidekick teams up with Blaze to prove his mettle.

programme.title: À l'affiche

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E38 - Innervasion Part 3: Strange Bedfellows
programme.desc: After the Junkbot shoots the Omnitrix and it begins glowing neon-blue, an imprisoned Vilgax explains it is now a gateway through which the Fulmini Empire will invade Earth.

programme.title: E39 - Innervasion Part 4: Mind Over Alien Matter
programme.desc: While inside the Omnitrix, Ben and Vilgax must work together if they are to close the gateway, but once the Fulmini leader, the High Override, appears, even that might not be enough.

programme.title: E40 - Innervasion Part 5: High Override
programme.desc: While Ben struggles to avoid the High Override's mind control, Max and Gwen enter the Omnitrix to lend a hand. Once they discover Ben is not who he seems, Max and Gwen must go all out to help him.

programme.title: E34 - The Grape Worm
programme.desc: When a neurotic parasite takes residence in Chowder's belly, Chowder thinks he's found his inner voice.

programme.title: E35 - Apprentice Appreciation Day
programme.desc: Mung decides to throw the biggest party he can in Chowder's honor.

programme.title: E36 - A Faire To Remember
programme.desc: Panini goes crazy with jealousy.

programme.title: E37 - Tofu-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Chowder discovers that Shnitzel had a previous life.

programme.title: E2 - Home Part 2
programme.desc: The class decide to raise money to pay for a music teacher.

programme.title: Bad News Bears

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Blue & Yellow 10Min
programme.desc: As different colors, blue and yellow can make green by getting together, similarly different lives can coexist by helping each other. This is a program to develop the mind of living together.

programme.title: Special Drama 'Guilty, The Ai Said'
programme.desc: Starring Yoshine Kyoko, the drama follows Kouenji Madoka, a rookie judge struggling under a heavy caseload when an experimental AI judge system is introduced. While Madoka remains wary of the technology, veteran judge Hiba Katsuhiro-presiding with her over a murder case involving a son accused of killing his father-grows increasingly reliant on the AI's verdict. Determined to uncover the truth on her own, Madoka pursues a conclusion different from the AI's.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Haiku poet Natsui Itsuki sets “Haiku Post” across Japan, and receives “your piece of Haiku”! She selects unique works from among them, and invites the authors of those haiku to share their intentions, memories, and life stories. ROLAND, the King of the Hosts, accompanies her as a partner on the trip.

programme.title: E112 - Prank U Next
programme.desc: Max seeks help dealing with a mystery prankster at school from his old principal, who was always the target of his pranks. But Max fails to stop the pranks and quits the mission, prompting Chloe to confess that she was the prankster all along.

programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.desc: At Lake Louise, Alexis and Thomas attempt to ski a couloir. Before going down, Alexis needs to refine his alpine skiing technique at a resort. It's a chance to discover the history of ski tourism in Canada and its impacts.

programme.title: E9 - Poo Poopidoo
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E10 - Frouch
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E26 - The Man Who Burns
programme.desc: While investigating Lily's troubled past after she is found poisoned, Marleau quickly directs her suspicions toward Frederic Lefranc. The actor and director had sent several love letters to the young woman. From the theatre stage to the crime scene, the line becomes blurred.

programme.title: E63 - Sully-Sur-Loire
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Chateau de Sully-sur-Loire, once a watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it was probably used by soldiers. Historical research continues to uncover its mysteries.

programme.title: E6 - Etienne Moyat - A Thousand And One Reliefs
programme.desc: Etienne Moyat's creations reflect his deep respect and love for nature. A trained cabinetmaker, he produces unique, monumental pieces for high-end projects. Alongside this, he pursues an intense and instinctive painting practice.

programme.title: Mission Info:2025-2026
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! programme.title: E3 - Pascale Roy Lafontaine, Surf Guide In Hawaii

programme.title: Mosaic Madness
programme.desc: Doki accidentally breaks Anabella's vintage tea tray and she's mad. Doki wants to make it up to her, but how can he fix her broken tea tray? The team heads to Istanbul, Turkey, where a ‘puzzle solving pro' is putting together fragments of an ancient ruin.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Maui
programme.desc: Explored Maui, Hawaii: Scuba lessons with turtles, Piiholo Ranch's longest zip line, Haiku rainforest hike, and capped the day with Ululani's Shave Ice. Final day included standup paddle boarding and surfing lessons. Adventure-packed week in paradise!

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: Squawker Walkers
programme.desc: When Shirley finds success with a simple invention, the gang decides to create a useless product that'll sell in huge numbers. Max worries that Noodles is jumping ship to work for Shirley.

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

programme.title: Shocking Olives
programme.desc: In Spain, a small company has come up with a new way to extract olive oil. By 'shocking' the olives with an electrical pulse before squeezing them, the pores in the cellular membranes are enlarged and more oil can be extracted.

programme.title: Matching Socks
programme.desc: In this episode we explain the concept of 'probability'. How can we weigh all our possibilities to eventually pick the most likely outcome? In order to illustrate our options, Eric rearranges his messy sock drawer – blindfolded.

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: The Need for Speed
programme.desc: All eyes are on speed skater Izzy who has one last chance to prove she has got what it takes to represent Team Great Britain at the Olympics. And ice dancer Ella swaps her ice skates for pedals at the velodrome.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

programme.title: Rock
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko have some solid ideas about what we can make with rocks.

programme.title: Why is the Sky Blue?
programme.desc: The sun emits radiant energy called electromagnetic radiation. The visible light and the colours we perceive are a form of this energy. The sky looks blue because the colour blue has the shortest wavelength.

programme.title: Can Any Animal Survive in Space?
programme.desc: A Tardigrade is an aquatic micro-animal measuring around 1mm long. In 2007 some of them were sent into space on the outside of a rocket. They were exposed to the sun's radiation and the airless vacuum for 10 days. Remarkably, many of these space voyagers survived.

programme.title: The Many Sides of Triangles
programme.desc: Eric tests the strength of a paper chair. Will it buckle under pressure or will it stand up to the test? Triangles are inherently strong because they form a fixed shape that's been used in architecture throughout the ages, but are they really the strongest shape ever?

programme.title: The Three Little Friends
programme.desc: Two little kids ask Mai to read them the story of 'The Three Little Pigs.' Mai doesn't want to admit that she can't read and pretends that she is reading. Yoko decides to help her by putting some pictures in the book to guide her.

programme.title: Heart Attach
programme.desc: Kaylyn and Alicia struggle to find a new name for the company. Noodles' love detection device disrupts the group's harmony and must ultimately get destroyed.

programme.title: The G.O.A.T (Roger Federer) and The Racer (Danica Patrick)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, tennis legend, French Open, and Grand Slam winner, Roger Federer, and the world's most successful woman in Indy car racing, Danica Patrick, share their stories on becoming the best in the world.

programme.title: Eye Gunk
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk!

programme.title: Going For Gold
programme.desc: In this episode, the female Elite team head to Brussels to battle the best artistic gymnasts in Europe at the start of the season, but for Amelie, one of the UK's brightest young stars, things take a dramatic twist.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

E12
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E7 - Kale Pesto With Cinghiale Sauce
programme.desc: After dining at a local restaurant, Rachael decides to create her own version of their special dish: Wild Boar Ragu served over Kale Pasta.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: After over a year of hard work, the time has come to wrap up the epic project. The four directors and the master eagerly rush to see the completed stores as the dramatic grand reveal begins.

programme.title: E75 - Dallas: Burks
programme.desc: Chauncey turns the tables on Derek by buying a tiny house without consulting him. But when a garage conversion turns into a permitting mess, will this Chauncey Special turn into a Chauncey Nightmare?

programme.title: E7 - Texas Taxidermy
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy target a listing in Round Rock, a mini city in the Hill Country. They hit the ground running with money-saving ways to turn a tacky time capsule for taxidermy into a modern desert oasis.

programme.title: E1 - Smoked Turkey Dinner
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: E1 - Smoked Turkey Dinner
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: E3 - Cold Blooded Killer Or Terrified Shooter?
programme.desc: A peaceful Sunday morning ends in tragedy when a car accident ends in a deadly altercation. A 25-year old man is charged with second-degree murder after he shoots a teenage driver dead.

programme.title: E547 - Four Shots
programme.desc: A construction worker is killed by a stray bullet during an attempted robbery inside a trailer park, but when investigators follow the trail of the suspects, things are not what they seem.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: After playing a demonic role, Malaysian actress Lavin Seow has a run-in with the supernatural; an uncle has to trap unfriendly spirits into a bottle before his niece would wake up from her coma.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Nine wandering spirits haunt a Singaporean family as they move into a new house; Karla Pambid from Philippines has a special gift - an ability to communicate with the unseen.

programme.title: E6 - Raven Abaroa
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa puts it all on the line for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo to show once and for all he did not murder his wife, Janet.

programme.title: E6 - Jim (Part B)
programme.desc: In 2019, Jim's daughter, Elesha, lost her job and needed a place to stay so she moved. Moving in with Jim however, dealing with the hoard has been the most difficult part of her life.

programme.title: E500 - Back Street
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: E1 - Friends & Enemies
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: E500 - Back Street
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: E1 - Friends & Enemies

programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: E1 - Friends & Enemies
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: E2 - Battle to Save a Sea Lion
programme.desc: Battle wind and waves to find a sea lion trapped in a plastic ring. Then visit the rescue center, where over 80 orphan seals must be fed several times a day to prepare for release into the wild, and see an Amazonian duck get a miraculous operation.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E1 - Winter is Coming
programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E10 - Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Trouble brews when the team makes the final attempt to reunite reluctant mother Dilla with her new baby Delilah. And Alba, the world’s only known albino orangutan, amazes her friends with her unique approach to termite foraging.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E2 - Strength in Sisterhood
programme.desc: The Hollywood pride reels after the Nomad’s brutal attack on their leader, Ava, leaves her desperately weak and unable to hunt. To add to her woes, her hungry pride start rejecting her. But without her, they struggle to bring down prey.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E4 - The Punks Strike Back
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa, and face an even greater threat on the other side.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E10 - Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Trouble brews when the team makes the final attempt to reunite reluctant mother Dilla with her new baby Delilah. And Alba, the world’s only known albino orangutan, amazes her friends with her unique approach to termite foraging.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E4 - Wales
programme.desc: Travel along the west coast of Great Britain, where the world’s longest uninterrupted footpath forges through more than 800 miles of breathtaking scenery. This majestic coast teems with wildlife, geological mysteries, and centuries of human history.

programme.title: Pridelands: Wilderness Reborn
programme.desc: An Australian family go on an adventure to restore an old hunting ranch in South Africa. Their goal is to rebuild the overgrown habitat, create an eco-tourism ranch, and allow the natural wildlife, including predators, to move back in.

programme.title: E2 - Strength in Sisterhood
programme.desc: The Hollywood pride reels after the Nomad’s brutal attack on their leader, Ava, leaves her desperately weak and unable to hunt. To add to her woes, her hungry pride start rejecting her. But without her, they struggle to bring down prey.

programme.title: E3 - Punks on the Run
programme.desc: The lions of the Nomad pride rampage deep into the heart of the MK pride’s territory, scattering its members and coming dangerously close to the five new MK cubs. Meanwhile, the Hollywoods are recovering, and Ava’s survival skills are still intact.

programme.title: E4 - The Punks Strike Back
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa, and face an even greater threat on the other side.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E6 - The Next Dynasty
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

CNN Newsroom: Saturday, May 23, 2026 5Am ET:CNN Newsroom E145
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: The Amanpour Hour: Saturday, May 23, 2026 11Am:The Amanpour Hour E21

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E426 - Boss' Birthday/Boss' Mom Ii/Tall Tales
programme.desc: In order to win his approval, the two Docs plan to catch Lamput to surprise Boss’ on his birthday, but things get complicated with the other docs in the lab plan to do the same thing. A fierce race starts between the two teams!

programme.title: E420 - Strength Potion/Rival's Revenge
programme.desc: Tired of the daily chores at home, Lamput buys a bottle of Super-Strength potion from a roadside salesman! The Docs realise this and try it out themselves, only for it to backfire.

programme.title: E1244 - Teen Titans Roar!/Bat Scouts
programme.desc: The Titans are outraged when their favorite cartoon is rebooted, so they come up with a plan to get this new show off the air.

programme.title: E117 - Smells Like Trouble/Bad Teacher/Wannabe Hero/Mirror, Mirror, Who's The Strongest?/She
programme.desc: Trico loves his new deodorant. Wanda doesn’t have the heart to tell him that it smells really bad, and even convinces the flock to play along. She’s faced with a dilemma: how long can you keep up a lie to avoid hurting your friend’s feelings?

programme.title: E134 - The List/The Deal/The Line/The Singing/The Puppets
programme.desc: When the kids find out that Mom's life hasn't panned out exactly as she'd hoped, they try to make her day a bit easier by taking on her chores. However, they accidentally grab her bucket list instead of her to-do list and end up attempting to tick off all of Nicole's life goals.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In this first episode, Samira journeys to places rarely seen by western audiences to reveal how the Persian Empire was born, the mysterious writing of its early people and how Iran's powerful kings built a vast empire that became the envy of the ancient world.

programme.title: E2 - Above The Clouds
programme.desc: Asia is the most mountainous continent on earth. From the tropical south to its barren centre, its highest places are home to some of our planet's most remarkable wildlife.

programme.title: E5 - Emptiness
programme.desc: British comedian and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones explores the prairies and vast sprawling plains of both Saskatchewon and Alberta provinces and discovers they reveal riches from fossils to farmland.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Wildfires in Oregon, flash floods in Arizona, a family survive the most powerful typhoon to hit the Philippines and a story of survival in sub-zero temperatures for seven days in the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Legendary Tigers Of India
programme.desc: In the jungles of north west India, there lives a remarkable wild tiger family. Now, using 50 years of footage, the story of their matriarchal clan is pieced together.

programme.title: Kuttey
programme.desc: One rainy night in the outskirts of Mumbai, three stray gangs unknowingly cross paths on the hunt and it's every man for himself.

programme.title: It's My Life
programme.desc: Abhishek is a young man from a wealthy family whose life has always been controlled by his overbearing father. However, he soon decides to stand up to him after falling in love with a woman.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Betaab
programme.desc: Love story of two youngsters who fall in love despite the status gaps between their families and must face the odds to stay together. Release Year: 1983 Director: Rahul Rawail

programme.title: Fanaa
programme.desc: A blind Kashmiri girl travels without her parents for the first time with a dance troupe to Delhi to perform in a ceremony for Independence Day. Release Year: 2006 Director: Kunal Kohli Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best ActreSS- Kajol, Best Lyrics- Prasoon Joshi, Best Playback Singer - Shaan and Kailash Kher for the song Chaand sifarish.

programme.title: Tere Naam
programme.desc: Radhey and Nirjala plan to get married. However, he is attacked by goons and sustains injuries to his head, and is admitted to an asylum. Release Year: 2003 Director: Satish Kaushik Awards: Best Music Director: Himesh Reshammiya, Best Newcomer Female: Bhoomika Chawla, Best Background Score Zee Cine Awards; Best Music: Himesh Reshammiya Screen Weekly Awards

programme.title: Sultan
programme.desc: Sultan Ali Khan, a former wrestler, quits after his son's death. Years later, he returns to the sport, seeking prize money and redemption, determined to reclaim his lost respect.

programme.title: The Sushi Hype - Lifestyle Trend With A Dark Side
programme.desc: Sushi: Once an expensive gourmet food, now a global fast-food phenomenon. Whether you get it from an Asian snack bar or a supermarket to-go box, sushi is trendy. It's low in calories, healthy, and affordable. But sushi consumption also brings problems.

programme.desc: Is Edinburgh simply living off Harry Potter's legacy? Or does the city have its own powers of enchantment? DW's Goenna Ketels explores Edinburgh, the city that inspired J.K. Rowling.

programme.title: Single Mom
programme.desc: Being a single mom is an everyday battle for many women. Financial stress, the lack of support or social isolation are just a few of the problems single moms face. In some Asian countries, single mothers continue to face heavy stigmatism. But one-parent families have been on the rise, due to increasing divorce rates, parental migration, and children born to single women.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E6 - Western Australia: More Than Meets The Eye
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: E8 - No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand’s West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Calming Sounds
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: Truant Hero
programme.desc: Police Commandant Wong orders officer Ken to go under cover as a schools teacher. Ken's assignment: to stop the infiltration by Taiwan's underworld. Ken is chosen not on his merit. In fact, he is a coward by nature and a bungler of things by choice. But luck seems to be with him. Just handcuffs on Ball, the notorious Mad Killer. Ken's girl friend Hing has jilted him. Once in school, Ken falls madly in love with the sexy teacher Moon. The students, however, make fun of him. Among his tormentors, student leader Ace stands out. But Hing is also assigned to the school as an undercover student. Very soon, she commands the awe and obedience of all girl students. So, when she is told to locate and protect Doggie, the son of a Taiwan gang leader, she and the girls start to strip all boys off their pants to see if they have a certain birthmark on their behind. The reason: this is the only way to identify Doggie...

programme.desc: Police Force - Commercial Crime Bureau has been investigating Jufeng's finance for many years, but all failed due to insufficient evidence. programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?
